summary: Built the Ingestion capability with a base handler class enforcing the standard pipeline (UUID → security gate → classify → route → audit log), 4 channel handlers (email with [TAG] subject parsing, voice skeleton, webhook with source routing, zo2zo with trust checking), and a keyword-based classifier returning type/urgency/topics. All handlers integrate with Security (inbound gate + audit writer) and Memory (conversation logger). All 5 scenarios pass.
decisions: Tag routing uses uppercase normalization — [knowledge] and [KNOWLEDGE] both match
Zo2Zo trust check reads security.yaml trusted_instances list, flags untrusted but still processes
Classifier uses 4 urgency levels and 5 content types, all keyword-driven from config
broadcast: Ingestion API: Use handler classes (EmailHandler, VoiceHandler, WebhookHandler, Zo2ZoHandler). Call handler.receive(raw_input) → returns InboundItem dict with id, channel, classification, routing_recommendation. classify_content(text) for standalone classification.
